name: Cocktail Kebabs
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Red bell pepper, seeded, cut into thin strips and decorative shapes
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove heads and body shells from shrimp but leave on tail shells.
2. Devein shrimp by removing black spinal cord.
3. Cut each green onion into 4 daisies.
4. Put shrimp, green onions, bell pepper, and olives in a bowl.
5. Mix garlic, lemon juice, olive oil, sugar, mustard, and horseradish.
6. Pour the mixture over shrimp mixture, cover, and marinate at least 2 hours, stirring occasionally.
7. Remove ingredients from marinade and thread equally on 8 wooden picks.
8. Drain on paper towels.
